sources.title: The Freshman, starring Harold Lloyd
sources.channelName: Public Domain Movies - Classic Old Movies

metadata.Plot: Clark Kellogg is a young man starting his first year at film school in New York City. After a small time crook steals all his belongings, Clark meets Carmine "Jimmy the Toucan" Sabatini, an "importer" bearing a startling resemblance to a certain cinematic godfather. When Sabatini makes Clark an offer he can't refuse, he finds himself caught up in a caper involving endangered species and fine dining.
metadata.Actors: Marlon Brando, Matthew Broderick, Bruno Kirby
